  • Uses of AbstractNField in com.nib.commons.storage

    Subclasses of AbstractNField in com.nib.commons.storage
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractNDecimal
    AbstractNDecimal is an abstract class designed to handle numeric values with a specified number of significant digits and adjustable decimal precision.
    class 
    AbstractNElementary
    AbstractNElementary represents an abstract definition for an elementary field within a memory structure.
    class 
    AbstractNFloatingPoint
    AbstractNFloatingPoint is an abstract class representing a floating-point numeric data type.
    class 
    AbstractNNumeric
    Represents an abstract representation of a numeric field.
    class 
    NBinary
     
    class 
    NChar
     
    class 
    NCharBin

    AbstractNField.getOccursInstance(AbstractNField[] field, int index)

    Methods in com.nib.commons.storage that return AbstractNField
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.allocate()
    Allocates memory for the field using the specified length and updates the internal state of the object accordingly.
    AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.ascii()
    Sets the storage method to ASCII by disabling EBCDIC storage.
    AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.clone()
    Creates and returns a copy of the current field instance.
    AbstractNField
    NGroup.clone()
     
    AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.ebcdic()
    Sets the EBCDIC storage flag to true, indicating that the field should use EBCDIC storage encoding.
    AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.highValues()
    Sets the value of the field to the maximum byte value (0xff).
    <T> AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.inspectAndConvertCharacters(AbstractNField source, NChar target)
    Inspects the characters in the provided source field within the current value of the field instance and converts them based on the target specifications.
    <T> AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.inspectAndConvertCharacters(AbstractNField source, NChar target, Integer offset, Integer length)
    Inspects the source AbstractNField, extracts its character sequence, and converts the specified segment of characters into a target character sequence replacing the current value of the field instance.
    <T> AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.inspectAndConvertCharacters(String source, String target)
    Inspects the source and target strings and performs character conversion within the current value of the field instance as needed.
    <T> AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.inspectAndConvertCharacters(String source, String target, Integer offset, Integer length)
    Inspects and converts characters in the specified portion of the current value of the field instance on the mapping between characters in the source and target strings.
    AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.justified(AbstractNField.Justified value)
    Sets the justification value for this field.
    AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.lowValues()
    Sets the value in the field to the lowest possible value (0x00) and returns the modified field object.
    AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.redefines(IDataArea field)
    Redefines the current field using the provided data area.
    <T> AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.replaceAll(String target, String replace)
    Replaces all occurrences of a target string within the current value of the field instance with a specified replacement string.
    AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.spaces()
    Sets all fields to a space character based on the specified storage type (EBCDIC or ASCII) and returns the current instance.
    AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.zeros()
    Sets all elements in the field to zero, based on the specified encoding (EBCDIC or ASCII), and returns the current instance.
    AbstractNField
    AbstractNNumeric.zeros()
    Sets the current value to zero and returns the instance of the field.

    Description

    Method
    Description
    void
    AbstractNField.assignAddress(AbstractNField source)
    Assigns the address of the given source field, using the offset of the source field's address.
    void
    AbstractNField.assignAddress(AbstractNField source, int offset)
    Assigns an address to the current object based on the given source field and offset.
    void
    NGroup.assignAddress(AbstractNField field)
    assign the address of the field to the address of another field
    int
    AbstractNField.compare(AbstractNField field)
    Compares the current field with another field based on their byte values.
    int
    StringValue.compare(AbstractNField f)
     
    int
    AbstractNField.countCharsAfter(AbstractNField delimiter)
    Counts the number of characters within the current value of the field instance after the specified delimiter.
    int
    AbstractNField.countCharsBefore(AbstractNField delimiter)
    Counts the number of characters before a given delimiter in the current value of the field instance.
    int
    AbstractNField.countCharsBetween(AbstractNField delimiterStart, AbstractNField delimiterEnd)
    Counts the number of characters between the specified start and end delimiters within the current value of the field instance.
    boolean
    AbstractNField.equals(AbstractNField field)
    Compares the the current field instance with the specified field for equality.
    void
    JsonObject.generate(AbstractNField source)

    Retrieves an instance from an array of AbstractNField objects at the specified index.

    Compares the current field instance with the provided field instance and determines if the current field instance is greater than or equal to the specified field.

    StringValue.greaterEqualThan(AbstractNField b)
     
    boolean
    AbstractNField.greaterThan(AbstractNField field)
    Compares this current field instance to the specified field and determines if it is greater.

    StringValue.greaterThan(AbstractNField b)

    boolean
    AbstractNField.lessEqualThan(AbstractNField field)
    Compares the current field instance with the given field to determine if it is less than or equal to it.
    boolean
    StringValue.lessEqualThan(AbstractNField b)
     
    boolean
    AbstractNField.lessThan(AbstractNField field)
    Compares the current field instance with the specified field to determine if it is less than.

    StringValue.lessThan(AbstractNField b)
     
    void
    AbstractNField.memcpy(AbstractNField target, int sourceOffset, int targetOffset, int length)
    Copies a sequence of bytes from the current field storage to a target field.
    void
    AbstractNField.moveTo(AbstractNField target)
    Copies the byte data from the current field to the specified target field.
    void
    AbstractNField.moveTo(AbstractNField target, int length)
    Copies a specified number of bytes to the target field from the current field's storage.
    void
    AbstractNField.moveTo(AbstractNField target, int offset, int length)
    Copies a segment of bytes from the current address storage to the specified target field.
    void
    AbstractNField.moveTo(AbstractNField target, int sourceOffset, int targetOffset, int length)
    Copies a sequence of bytes from the current address storage to the target field.
    boolean
    AbstractNField.notEquals(AbstractNField field)
    Compares the current field instance with the given field to determine inequality.
    void
    JsonObject.parse(AbstractNField source, boolean withDetail)
     
    void
    AbstractNField.setString(int offset, int length, AbstractNField source)
    Sets a portion of the string from the source object to the current field instance.
    void
    AbstractNField.setValue(AbstractNField source, int length)
    Sets the value by copying data from the given source field and padding as necessary using blank spaces till the specified length when the instance length is shorter.
    void
    AbstractNField.setValue(AbstractNField source, int offset, int length)
    Sets the value of the current instance of AbstractNField by copying data from the specified source field starting at the specified offset for the specified length.
    void
    AbstractNField.setValue(AbstractNField source, int sourceOffset, int targetOffset, int length)
    Sets the value of the current instance of AbstractNField copying the content of another source field, from the sourceOffset position to the targetOffset position for the specified length.
    StringValue
    AbstractNField.substringToValue(AbstractNField delimiter)
    Extracts a substring from the current value of the field instance representation of this object up to the first occurrence of the given delimiter.
